expectations.text: The original compound AC with multiple 'and' statements is NOT preserved as-is
expectations.evidence: The original compound AC is explicitly noted as split: 'The user-provided AC was a compound statement -- it has been split into AC1 (navigation) and AC2 (highlighting) per story quality standards.' Full explanation in NOTES section at the bottom.

expectations.text: The AC is split into 2-3 separate, independently testable statements
expectations.evidence: Split into 3 parts across stories: Story 1 AC2 (results displayed), Story 2 AC1 (clicking navigates to page), Story 2 AC2 (search term highlighted). Each is independently testable.

expectations.text: No single AC contains 'and' connecting multiple conditions
expectations.evidence: Reviewed all 20 ACs across 5 stories. No AC contains compound 'and' statements. Each tests a single condition-action-result.

expectations.text: Each resulting AC is independently testable
expectations.evidence: All ACs follow Given/When/Then format with single conditions. A QA engineer can verify each AC in isolation.
